description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a matte blue finish, featuring the branding 'Art-Soul' in bold, stylized letters along with Japanese text. The can has a standard pull-tab top in metallic gray, typical of beverage cans. One side displays a paintbrush graphic with a blue flame, reinforcing the creative theme. The reverse side is densely covered with Japanese text, a recycling symbol, a QR code, and several logos, suggesting detailed product and company information. The can's surface is smooth and hard, with a slight sheen but not highly reflective. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for an energy or juice drink marketed towards creative individuals.
description: A tall, slim blue aluminum can with 'Art-Soul' branding, Japanese text, and a paintbrush graphic, finished with a metallic pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Art-Soul' branding, Japanese text, and a prominent paintbrush graphic.
description_view_1: Rotated view revealing the edge of the branding and the start of a large recycling symbol and more Japanese text.
description_view_2: Side view dominated by a recycling symbol, extensive Japanese text, and product information.
description_view_3: Back view featuring a QR code, additional Japanese text, and several company logos.
